parameters.jsCode: const WEBHOOK_NODE='Webhook';const EXTRACT_NAMES=['Extract Variables','Extract Variables SYN','Extract Variables DHN','Extract Variables DHN1','Extract Variables1'];function readOrderIdFromWebhook(){try{const j=$(WEBHOOK_NODE).first().json;const b=j?.body!==undefined&&j?.body!==null&&typeof j.body==='object'&&!Array.isArray(j.body)?j.body:j;let id=typeof b?.orderId==='string'?b.orderId.trim():'';if(!id&&typeof j?.orderId==='string')id=j.orderId.trim();return id||null;}catch(e){return null;}}function readOrderIdFromExtracts(){for(const n of EXTRACT_NAMES){try{const v=$(n).first()?.json?.orderId;if(typeof v==='string'&&v.trim())return v.trim();}catch(e){}}return null;}const siteCallbackOrderId=readOrderIdFromWebhook()||readOrderIdFromExtracts();if(!siteCallbackOrderId)return[];return[{json:{siteCallbackOrderId}}];
